October 4, 2018

A few weeks ago I asked if anyone ever deleted their entire Apple Music collection and started over. Well, I just did. Re-booting and adding back with purpose and mindful of the all-you-can-eat world we live in now. Before: 44,000+ songs. Current: 1,486 and a focus on quality.

End on End @endonend
